name: Patient 35
history: Difficult family conversation with mother about not discussing pain/suffering. Father avoids therapy, has distressing dreams about brother's suicide. Patient reports ongoing struggles with separation and suffering.
helpless_belief: I am trapped in family silence
unlovable_belief: My pain is too much for others
intermediate_belief: Emotional pain must be hidden to protect others.
intermediate_belief_depression: My family's trauma has permanently damaged our ability to connect.
coping_strategies: Emotional numbing, intellectualizing feelings, avoiding vulnerable conversations.
situation: Talking with Jeremy about feelings of disconnection, trying to describe detachment and associated pain.
auto_thought: "He won't understand. No one can. I should just pretend I'm fine."
behavior: Uses abstract metaphors, changes subject when emotions surface, makes self-deprecating joke.
